title: Zovark — LLM Performance
description: Ticket 7 — LLM latency, tokens, errors (span name llm.call).

panels.title: LLM p95 / avg duration (seconds)
panels.query: SELECT quantile(0.95)(durationNano)/1e9 AS p95_s, avg(durationNano)/1e9 AS avg_s, count() AS calls FROM signoz_index_v2 WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND name = 'llm.call'

panels.title: LLM calls by model (tagMap)
panels.query: SELECT tagMap['llm.model'] AS model, count() AS calls FROM signoz_index_v2 WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND name = 'llm.call' GROUP BY model ORDER BY calls DESC

panels.title: LLM errors (statusCode=2)
panels.query: SELECT count() FROM signoz_index_v2 WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND name = 'llm.call' AND statusCode = 2

panels.title: Token totals (span attributes — if exported as tags)
panels.query: SELECT tagMap['llm.tokens_in'] AS tin, tagMap['llm.tokens_out'] AS tout, count() FROM signoz_index_v2 WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND name = 'llm.call' GROUP BY tin, tout LIMIT 50
